IS OFF CALENDAR PURSUANT TO DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION FILED APRIL 29, 2013. JUDGE: RICHARD KRAMER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. PETITION IN RE DEBRA ANN BLYTHE FILED BY PETITIONER ALLSTATE SETTLEMENT CORPORATION AS TO RESPONDENT BLYTHE, DEBRA ANN

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ALLSTATE SETTLEMENT CORPORATION'S PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS BY AND BETWEEN DEBRA ANN BLYTHE, TRANSFEROR, AND ALLSTATE SETTLEMENT CORPORATION, TRANSFEREE, PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA INSURANCE CODE 10134 ET SEQ CONTINUED FROM APR-12-2013 TO LAW AND MOTION AT APR-24-2013, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APRIL 24, 2013 TO GIVE ALLSTATE SETTLEMENT CORPORATION THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN APRIL 16, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE PETITION WILL BE DENIED. ALLSTATE SETTLEMENT CORPORATION SHALL FILE AND SERVE AN AMENDED NOTICE THAT STATES THE CONTINUED DATE BY EXPRESS MAIL. THE COURT ONLY HAS A COURTESY COPY OF THE NOTICE AND A PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER #5976
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-24-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ALLSTATE SETTLEMENT CORPORATION'S HEARING ON PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS BY AND BETWEEN DEBRA ANN BLYTHE, TRANSFEROR, AND ALLSTATE SETTLEMENT CORPORATION, TRANSFEREE, PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA INSURANCE CODE 10134 IS CONTINUED TO MAY 23, 2013 IN ORDER TO GIVE TIME FOR MS. BLYTHE TO HIRE AN ATTORNEY TO GIVE HER ADVISE AS TO HER RIGHTS REGARDING THE STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT. ALLSTATE WILL PAY UP TO $1,500.00 FOR MS. BYLTE'S ATTORNEY. MR. GELB TO GIVE NOTICE OF THE NEW HEARING DATE TO ALL PARTIES AND A COPY TO THE COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Debra Ann Blythe, Transferor, And Allstate Settlement Corporation, Transferee, Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134 Et Seq
Off Calendar May-23-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER ALLSTATE SETTLEMENT CORPORATION's Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Debra Ann Blythe, Transferor, And Allstate Settlement Corporation, Transferee, Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134 Et Seq. is off calendar pursuant to dismissal of entire action of all parties and all causes of action filed April 29, 2013. Judge: Richard Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Debra Ann Blythe, Transferor, And Allstate Settlement Corporation, Transferee, Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134 Et Seq
Off Calendar Apr-24-2013 Continued To May-23-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. PAUL M. GELB OF THE DRINKER BIDDLE & REATH LLP, TEL. NO. (310) 203-4028 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
DEBRA ANN BLYTHE, TEL. NO. 812-1413, RESPONDENT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. PETITIONER ALLSTATE SETTLEMENT CORPORATION'S Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Debra Ann Blythe, Transferor, And Allstate Settlement Corporation, Transferee, Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134 IS CONTINUED TO MAY 23, 2013 IN ORDER TO GIVE TIME FOR MS. BLYTHE TO HIRE AN ATTORNEY TO GIVE HER ADVISE AS TO HER RIGHTS REGARDING THE STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT. ALLSTATE WILL PAY UP TO $1,500.00 FOR MS. BYLTE'S ATTORNEY. MR. GELB TO GIVE NOTICE OF THE NEW HEARING DATE TO ALL PARTIES AND A COPY TO THE COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Debra Ann Blythe, Transferor, And Allstate Settlement Corporation, Transferee, Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134 Et Seq
Off Calendar Apr-12-2013 Continued To Apr-24-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER ALLSTATE SETTLEMENT CORPORATION'S Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Debra Ann Blythe, Transferor, And Allstate Settlement Corporation, Transferee, Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134 Et Seq is continued on the court's own motion to April 24, 2013 to give Allstate Settlement Corporation the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than April 16, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the petition will be denied. Allstate Settlement Corporation shall file and serve an Amended Notice that states the continued date by express mail. The Court only has a courtesy copy of the notice and a proposed order. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
